generate: You are a CRO copywriter. Write ONE call-to-action (a button label or short CTA line) for the product below — a clear next step tied to real value, low friction. Return ONLY the CTA.
briefs: a budget-friendly meal-prep app for busy parents
a posture-correcting desk chair for remote workers
an AI note-taker that joins your video calls
a debt-payoff app that rounds up your purchases
a language-learning app focused on speaking, not grammar
a stain-resistant white sneaker for parents of toddlers

a sleep supplement without melatonin grogginess
a resume tool that rewrites bullets for a specific job posting
